title: allowlist.json — accepted cross-framework deviations (suppressed in the fidelity grade)
description: Token + render deltas that are intentional, not drift. The grader pairs by RENDERED hex/geometry, never token name. Seed from the project's design-tokens vs Claude Design tokens diff + the known Skia-vs-CSS engine deltas.

class.description: token = palette/scale deviation; render = engine (Skia line-box, elevation/shadow, AA edges, M3 padding); translation = a deliberate translate-to-the-design-system deviation from an imported screenshot reference.

rule.description: Human description of the accepted deviation.

suppress.description: The precise condition under which a vision finding is suppressed.

states.description: OPTIONAL per-state scoping: when present, verify applies this entry ONLY to the listed stateIds. Entries without it keep the global (every-state) semantics. Use for per-state translation deviations — recording one globally would suppress that delta estate-wide and erode grade sensitivity.
